name: Easy Garlic Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Use an unwaxed garden cucumber; wash but do not peel.
2. Slice the cucumber into a food processor bowl.
3. Add the garlic.
4. Process with pulse motion just until coarsely chopped.
5. Empty the mixture into a filter-lined coffee cone to drain for one hour or more.
6. Season to taste.
7. Makes approximately 1 cup, under 5 calories per tablespoon.
